title: Chest With Legs
body:
![Chester](https://i.imgur.com/aQhRPOx.png)

A mod that adds a new way to store your items. 
#  **Versions starting from 2.0 no longer require Geckolib!**


# Mechanics

When the summoning item is crafted press right click on any block to spawn the mob.


If you want to despawn the mob simply click on it with the bound summoning item.


To make the mob sit, sneak and right click on the mob.

If the mob is lost it can be teleported to its owner with the command /returnchest (Keep in mind it requires cheats enabled)

# Chester
The original goober (My favorite)
![Chester](https://i.imgur.com/u7QHcKX.png)
# Dark Chester
Evolved variant of the standard Chester, to do that you need to place 16 soul sand, 4 amethyst, 4 phantom membranes, and 6 crying obsidian.
![Dark Chester](https://i.imgur.com/RntgGHH.png)
# Hutch
Emits light with the strenght of 15
![Hutch](https://i.imgur.com/3QQnOhx.png)
# Ro Bin
Only way of obtaining him is by hatching the Stone Egg by placing it near a campfire.
![Ro Bin](https://i.imgur.com/KuipTaj.png)
### Found a issue or have a question? Because i don't have a Github, i recommend going to Curseforge and leaving a comment there [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chest-with-legs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chest-with-legs)
